experiment_setting.candidate_policy: deterministic tactic router, first 3 candidates per theorem

experiment_setting.repair_loop: generate -> Lean verify -> feed diagnostics back to model
experiment_setting.diagnostics: Generated candidates were rechecked by Lean. Failures were tactic/proof errors or provider remote-close events; import preamble normalization removes narrow Mathlib import failures.

reference_results.scope: organizer smoke rerun under AISB/NLPCC evaluator; full 160000-token setting remains the required reporting configuration when provider connection permits
external full benchmark reference, not AISB/NLPCC official score
external full benchmark reference, not AISB/NLPCC official score

note: The local baseline confirms AISB Lean/Mathlib execution. Competitive T2 proof-search should build on DeepSeek-Prover/ReProver-style search, but those external results are reference results only until rerun under the NLPCC package.
